problem id: 5b36e273
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01000100 -> 00110010
  01011110 -> 01010111
  00011100 -> 01111110
  10101001 -> 11110000
  10100011 -> 11011101
  11101000 -> 11010100
  11101011 -> 11011001
  10011001 -> 00101000
  11011111 -> 00010011

query: 11100010
predicted answer: 11111001
